lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear from normal use. All mechanical systems are fully operational and have been regularly maintained.
The vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior. All major systems are functional and the vehicle is well-maintained.

This vehicle is in good condition, reflecting consistent care and regular maintenance. The exterior remains clean and attractive, showing only minor cosmetic wear like small rock chips on the hood and light scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is tidy with minimal wear on the upholstery and all electronic features functioning as intended. Mechanically, the car drives smoothly and has a reliable service history. It offers a solid, dependable driving experience for its next owner.
Fair condition.

Calling all DIY fans and project seekers! This vehicle is looking for a new owner ready to give it some serious TLC. While it's in poor condition and needs significant mechanical or cosmetic work, it's a fantastic, budget-friendly opportunity for a restoration enthusiast or someone looking for a dedicated project car. Priced to move and full of potential for the right person!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint retains a strong finish, though you will find some minor cosmetic imperfections such as small stone chips on the hood and a few light surface scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved, with all features and electronics functioning as intended. Mechanically, the car is solid; it starts reliably, handles smoothly, and has had regular oil changes and service. While it shows some signs of careful previous ownership, it remains a dependable and attractive choice for anyone looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle that is ready for the road.

Presenting a vehicle of superlative caliber, maintained to exacting showroom standards. This specimen exhibits flawless paintwork and a pristine interior, representing the pinnacle of its class. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering provides an unrivaled driving experience and investment-grade quality.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty—it's in absolutely stunning condition! I've treated this car like my own baby, and it honestly looks and drives like it just came off the showroom floor. Not a scratch or a dent to be found, and the interior is totally spotless. It’s a real gem that's been super well-loved and meticulously maintained. If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new, you've found it! Drop me a message if you want to take it for a spin!

This collector-grade 997.1 Carrera S is powered by a 3.8L horizontally opposed DOHC engine, delivering linear power through a short-throw 6-speed manual gearbox. The drivetrain features a factory-fitted mechanical limited-slip differential and PASM (Porsche Active Suspension Management) for precision handling and transient stability. This specimen showcases flawless paint depth and a cabin devoid of bolster wear or plastic degradation. With a documented service history confirming zero bore scoring and a clean DME report, this vehicle represents a peak-mechanical example of the naturally aspirated flat-six era. Tuned for the purist, it maintains strict factory tolerances and exceptional chassis feedback.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records available. Title in hand.

This vehicle is a pristine example of automotive excellence, meticulously maintained to meet the highest standards of a true showroom-quality specimen. The exterior boasts a flawless, deep-gloss finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip, while the interior remains in untouched condition, featuring supple leather that still retains its factory-fresh scent. Every mechanical component has been serviced exclusively by master technicians using OEM parts, documented by a comprehensive history folder. Garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and never driven in inclement weather, the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. For the buyer seeking a turn-key collector piece that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership, this is the definitive choice.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, currently held in a state of impeccable preservation. This unit exhibits a level of aesthetic and mechanical integrity that mirrors its original factory delivery. The exterior retains a mirror-like finish, while the interior remains entirely free of wear or compromise. For the individual seeking a superlative example of this model, this offering represents an unparalleled opportunity. Performance is seamless, and every component functions to the highest manufacturer specifications.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting a level of preservation that is exceedingly rare in the pre-owned market. From its flawless exterior finish to its meticulously kept interior, every aspect of this automobile confirms its status as a collector-grade acquisition. We invite discerning buyers to experience this unparalleled example of engineering and luxury, which stands as a testament to conscientious ownership.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another one like this. This beauty has been my absolute pride and joy, and it’s still looking and driving like it just rolled off the lot! It’s in absolutely pristine, mint condition—spotless inside and out. I've babied this car since day one, kept it garaged, and stayed on top of every single service. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

Presenting a museum-grade E46 M3, preserved in true collector-tier condition. This S54-powered icon features a high-revving 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual and a functional M-variable differential lock. Mechanical integrity is paramount: the VANOS system has been professionally bulletproofed, and the rear subframe has been reinforced to exceed factory specifications. The suspension retains its original geometry with zero bushing deflection, ensuring telepathic turn-in. Finished in flawless Laguna Seca Blue, this specimen represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated Bavarian engineering.
Mint condition. No mechanical issues. Flawless exterior and interior. Full service history. Clean title.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, preserved in showroom condition since day one. Every inch of the original deep-metallic paint remains flawless, protected by a professional ceramic coating with absolutely zero rock chips, swirl marks, or door dings. Inside, the cabin still carries that distinctive new-car scent; the premium leather seats show no bolster wear or creasing, and the high-gloss trim is free of any micro-scratches. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach. It has been serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships, with a comprehensive folder of receipts detailing every fluid flush and inspection performed ahead of schedule. The engine bay is meticulously clean, and the transmission shifts with seamless precision. All electronics, from the panoramic sunroof to the premium surround-sound system, function exactly as they did the day it was manufactured. It sits on a fresh set of high-performance tires and comes complete with two original keys, the factory window sticker, and all original manuals. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly pristine example of automotive excellence.

Presenting an unparalleled acquisition opportunity: a vehicle preserved in superlative condition. This specimen exhibits an immaculate exterior finish paired with a pristine, wear-free cabin. Rigorously maintained to an exacting standard, it remains mechanically indistinguishable from its original showroom state. This is an uncompromising example for the discerning driver who demands excellence.

Presenting a vehicle of uncompromising caliber, meticulously curated to meet the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish complemented by an interior preserved in showroom state. Mechanically flawless and accompanied by a comprehensive service history, this vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning collector who demands absolute perfection and long-term value.

Hi there! 🚗✨ I am honestly so excited to show you this absolute gem! It is in total mint condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it spotless and garage-kept. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner who will love it as much as I have. Come see it for yourself, you won't be disappointed!

This 997.1 Carrera S is an immaculate example of Stuttgart engineering, preserved in showroom condition. Powered by a 3.8L naturally aspirated flat-six, the engine features a robust power band with peak torque delivery optimized via VarioCam Plus. The 6-speed manual transaxle offers precise gates and a crisp engagement, paired with a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis integrity is absolute, featuring Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) that remains perfectly calibrated. Mechanical maintenance is current, including a verified IMS solution and a clean DME overrev report. The paint depth is consistent across all panels, and the undercarriage remains free of any oxidation or fluid seepage. This is a turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. Clean title. Full maintenance records included.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality masterpiece that defies its age. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior finish that is entirely free of rock chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. The interior is equally breathtaking, featuring supple, uncreased leather seating, pristine trim accents, and that distinct 'new car' aroma. Mechanically, the car performs exactly as it did the day it left the factory, supported by a comprehensive folder of every service record performed exclusively by certified technicians. From the flawless alloy wheels wrapped in premium rubber to the untouched undercarriage, every detail has been preserved for the most discerning collector. This is not just a used car; it is a time-capsule example of engineering excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an interior and exterior preserved to an exacting standard. With an impeccable service history and no discernible wear, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in showroom condition. Mechanically superior and aesthetically peerless, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly mint-condition asset that defies its age.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to show you this car—it’s been my absolute pride and joy! I’ve babied it from day one, and it’s in truly spectacular, like-new condition. It looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot, and I promise you won’t find a single flaw. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!

Offering an impeccable E46 M3, a pinnacle of BMW M-division engineering. This example features the high-revving S54 inline-six engine, utilizing individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system that remains in peak operating condition. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting an absolute showroom-standard specimen that redefines the term 'pre-owned.' This vehicle has been meticulously curated and maintained to a standard rarely seen outside of a private collection. The exterior paint is flawless, displaying a deep, mirror-like luster enhanced by a professional-grade ceramic coating; there are no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in a 'time-capsule' state. The premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any creasing or bolster wear, still retaining that distinct factory-fresh aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance features, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous, open-checkbook maintenance schedule performed exclusively at authorized service centers. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the undercarriage reflects the car’s life in a climate-controlled garage. It sits on pristine alloy wheels with zero curb rash, wrapped in high-performance tires with nearly full tread. For the buyer who demands perfection and a turn-key experience, this is the definitive choice.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition. This unit exhibits flawless aesthetic preservation and peak mechanical integrity, reflecting a standard of care that transcends typical ownership. From the pristine interior appointments to the mirror-finish exterior, every detail affirms its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning driver. Experience unrivaled refinement and uncompromising quality.
